text.text:
*What happened*
378 scanned → 348 considered → 3 shipped

*Why it matters*
Upstream verdict pass was strong — all 6 drafts kept as-is with reasonable tier calls. The notable miss was obra/superpowers, promoted along with Antigravity 2.0 and Graphiti 0.29.1. Briefing now reads as a security-led week, a major Google I/O frontier-model beat, and local-tooling momentum.

*What to do next*
• PydanticAI v1.100.0: Patch this sprint and validate with SSRF regression tests.
• obra/superpowers: Run one lab and compare execution quality against baseline prompts.
• DeepSeek-V4-Pro: Hold and re-evaluate only if legal and security sign off.

fields.text:
*Decision Mix*
1 ADOPT · 1 TRIAL · 0 ASSESS · 1 HOLD
1 critical · 2 high · 0 standard

elements.text: — Directly relevant to production agents that fetch external references; this closes a real exploit path in our stack.
— Already adjacent to our internal workflow, and recent traction suggests better reusable patterns for agent guidance.
— Team demand is high, so we need an explicit do-not-adopt signal to avoid accidental policy drift.
Full verdict cards and actions are in thread · `/radar <tool>` · `/recall <topic>`
